summary: Verified migrated utility routes from server.py to routes/utils.py. All 4 endpoints tested successfully: zip code lookup (valid/invalid) and weekly content (authenticated/public).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Utility routes migration from server.py to routes/utils.py verified working. Routes tested: GET /api/lookup/zipcode/{zipcode} (valid returns city/state, invalid returns 404), GET /api/weekly-content (MOM auth required, returns personalized weekly tip), GET /api/weekly-content/all (public, returns 42 pregnancy + 6 postpartum weeks). All tests passed.

GET /api/weekly-content (Mom auth).details: Returns personalized weekly tip and affirmation based on mom's due date

GET /api/weekly-content/all.details: Returns 42 pregnancy weeks + 6 postpartum weeks with tips and affirmations
